<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_id}/contractor_payment_groups"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Pay a group of contractors. Information needed depends on the contractor's wage type (hourly vs fixed)

scope: `payrolls:run`
